untranslatable_reason: Cup with Handle is a visual chart pattern requiring pattern recognition algorithms not available in the allowed indicator set. The pattern itself (cup formation with handle consolidation and upward breakout) cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators without custom pattern detection. Entry condition 'Formation of cup with handle pattern' is not translatable to mathematical conditions using allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using Bollinger Band upper breakout (proxy for upward breakout detection) and ADX confirmation (trend strength), but this does not capture the actual Cup with Handle pattern geometry. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection code outside the standard indicator framework.
